subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards the Center of the Covenant! O Samandar, divine flame ignited, whose mention is ablaze with the fire of yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بمرکز میثاق حضرت سمندر نار موقده الهیه ذکر آن مشتعل باتش اشتیاق
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
